objective: Build and validate a passkey sign-in flow while allowing exact browser evidence to revise later milestones
adaptive_reason: The final UX and session behavior may need to change after authenticated browser verification

workers.scope: implement passkey UI, handlers, session behavior, tests, and evidence-safe fixes

acceptance_criteria: Passkey registration and sign-in behavior is covered by deterministic tests
The exact integrated artifact passes lint, typecheck, tests, and build
Authenticated browser behavior is verified without exposing credentials
Every milestone receives code review and Roadmap Audit before the next milestone
Final integrated review contains no unresolved required fix

milestones.outcome: Establish the passkey and session contract with deterministic tests
decisions: Keep production credentials and deployment out of scope

milestones.outcome: Implement the passkey UI, handlers, and session persistence
Prove registration, sign-in, callback, and session behavior in an authenticated local browser
blockers: A local authenticated browser profile must be available when verification begins

milestones.outcome: Close browser-discovered gaps and produce a bounded final readiness package
required_evidence: retest of every failed local verification id

goals.objective: Define the passkey/session contract and add deterministic failing-then-passing tests
success_criteria: Contract tests cover registration, sign-in, callback, and session persistence
goals.dispatch_when: startup transaction, native or emulated Controller Goal, and controller lease are acknowledged

goals.objective: Implement the passkey UI, handlers, and session behavior against the audited contract
success_criteria: Lint, typecheck, tests, and build pass on the exact artifact
goals.dispatch_when: M1 code review and Roadmap Audit are acknowledged and M2 is the sole Active milestone

review_questions: Can a user understand and complete passkey sign-in?
Are errors and recovery actions visible without exposing credentials?

goals.objective: Prepare the exact artifact for authenticated local verification and repair only evidence-backed failures
success_criteria: Every Local Verifier failure is repaired and retested with the same verification id
goals.dispatch_when: M2 Roadmap Audit activates M3 and the local verification prerequisites are available

goals.objective: Integrate approved fixes, rerun the full validation ladder, and prepare bounded readiness documentation
success_criteria: Full validation and final integrated review pass with explicit limitations
goals.dispatch_when: M3 local verification and Roadmap Audit are acknowledged and M4 is Active

claim: local passkey implementation and authenticated-browser smoke only; not production security readiness
subagent_input_policy: Only workspace source paths and redacted local validation logs; never secrets, cookies, credentials, private browser data, or external uploads
metered_runtime_policy: Real paid LLM/provider calls are deferred; local deterministic implementation and browser verification only
human_approval_policy: Local scoped implementation, validation, read-only browser inspection, and bounded read-only subagents are pre-authorized. Production credentials, deploy, merge, external writes, and claim expansion remain human gates.
commit_policy: No commit, push, PR, merge, or deploy in this example
loop_state_git_policy: Keep .codex-loop and local browser evidence out of product commits
thread_topology: one reusable implementation task, one serial State-Writer, one just-in-time Reviewer reused for code and roadmap audit, and one just-in-time Local Verifier
runtime_blockers: First dependency install may require bounded registry retries
Authenticated browser state may be unavailable
Browser evidence may require another implementation/retest cycle
time_factors: Availability of an authenticated local browser profile
connectors: Codex App project task and automation tools; local browser/computer-use tools only when exposed
worktree_policy: one shared integration worktree for sequential implementation goals; Reviewer and Local Verifier use same-directory access when exact worktree evidence is required
review: code review and Roadmap Audit required before every milestone transition; final integrated review required
